allow: Bash(cd "C:/Users/user/Desktop/클로드" && npm run build 2>&1 | tail -8; echo "=== cleanup ==="; rm -f src/content/posts/seoul-seoul-sample-spot-*.md && echo "removed dummy test post")
Bash(cd "C:/Users/user/Desktop/클로드" && DUMMY=1 POSTS_PER_RUN=1 node scripts/generate.mjs 2>&1 | head -5; rm -f src/content/posts/seoul-seoul-sample-spot-*.md; echo "\(cleaned\)")

Bash(cd "C:/Users/user/Desktop/클로드" && KEY=$\(grep '^GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY=' .env | cut -d= -f2\) && echo "=== with ?key= query param + verbose headers ===" && curl -s -D - -o /tmp/body.txt "https://places.googleapis.com/v1/places:searchText?key=$KEY" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-Goog-FieldMask: places.displayName' -d '{"textQuery":"Seoul","maxResultCount":1}' | grep -iE 'http/|www-authenticate|x-goog|vary|content-type' ; echo "--- body ---" ; cat /tmp/body.txt)

Bash(curl -s -w '\\nHTTP %{http_code}\\n' -X POST https://places.googleapis.com/v1/places:searchText -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-Goog-Api-Key: AIzaSyC4GZ5e1OT60BWNJ0bTReSM7xOZwRZ2VXs' -H 'X-Goog-FieldMask: places.displayName' -d '{"textQuery":"Seoul Tower","maxResultCount":1}')
Bash(git commit -m 'publish: add manual '\\''count'\\'' input for bulk generation runs *)
